global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with promotional text and a call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a 2-for-1 offer on fresh favorites.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: CraveLoop logo
elements.description: A stylized logo featuring the word 'CraveLoop' in bold, modern typography, set against a contrasting background.

elements.label: Three card shapes
elements.description: Three rectangular card shapes with a slight sheen, arranged in a row, suggesting a digital interface.

elements.label: Background element
elements.description: A soft, gradient background that transitions from light to dark purple, providing a vibrant backdrop for the ad.

elements.label: Promotional headline
elements.description: Bold, white text stating '2-for-1 tonight' with a smaller subtitle 'Fresh favorites nearby' underneath, conveying a promotional message.

elements.label: Price display
elements.description: A prominent price tag displaying '€29.99' in a clear, bold font, positioned at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Shop now' in white, set against a contrasting background, inviting user interaction.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, CraveLoop logo, promotional headline, price display, call to action
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the promotional headline in the center, with the price at the bottom and the call to action button below it.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: 2-for-1 tonight, Fresh favorites nearby, CraveLoop, €29.99, Shop now
